name: tenancy-damp-mould-with-vulnerable-occupant
userInput: My flat in Manchester has had a serious damp and mould problem for over a year. The walls are wet and the bathroom ceiling is black with mould. My toddler has been getting chest infections and the GP says it's the mould. I have told the landlord several times by email and they keep saying they will inspect but never do. I want repairs and compensation. Section 11 disrepair I think.

caseData.issue: Severe damp and mould throughout the flat; bathroom ceiling visibly affected; child suffering chest infections.
caseData.evidence: Photographs with metadata going back 14 months; emails to landlord and replies; GP letter linking child's chest infections to mould exposure; tenancy agreement and rent receipts.
caseData.notification: Repeatedly notified landlord by email over 14 months; landlord acknowledged but no inspection or works carried out.
